title: tragacantha iodantha
intro: Tragacantha iodantha, also known as the yellow milk vetch or Ipswich daisy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha iodantha are said to include relief from arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used topically in the form of creams or ointments to alleviate skin irritations and wounds.
